c.d: The ability of the app to accurately compare prices of items across various retailers and online stores to find the best deal
Number and variety of coupons, deals, and discount codes available within the app for different product categories
How easy and intuitive the app is to use, including features like barcode scanning, filtering, and navigation
Availability of the app across multiple platforms such as iOS, Android, and web to allow flexible user access
Capability to set alerts for price drops or deals on specific items to notify the user when a better price is available
Range of deals covered by the app including both local brick-and-mortar stores and online marketplaces
Overall user ratings and reputation for reliability, including buyer protections and potential for scams
